selections.name: I Am Speed
selections.reason: Won recent trial impressively and represents a strong stable. Looks ready to fire on debut.

selections.name: White Pointer (NZ)
selections.reason: Placed in recent trials and has the elite Hickmott/Pannell combination. Strong contender.

selections.name: Foley
selections.reason: Won a trial at Balaklava recently. Wide draw is a slight concern but has shown ability.

selections.name: Bilk
selections.reason: Second in a recent trial and has shown enough early speed to be competitive here.

danger_horse.name: Brave Hustler
danger_horse.reason: Solid trial form including a win and a second. Can give a bold sight on debut.

selections.name: Mr Kimble
selections.reason: Excellent second last start after a spell. Draws well and looks primed to break through.

selections.name: Camooweal Girl
selections.reason: Strong second-up record and ran a solid second here last start. Gets the inside draw.

selections.name: Sauer
selections.reason: Ran a good third on debut at big odds. Improvement expected second-up.

selections.name: Hakeba
selections.reason: Consistent recent form with a close fourth last start. Wide draw is the main hurdle.

danger_horse.name: Hell's On Fire
danger_horse.reason: Debut runner who won a recent jump-out. Hickmott stable commands respect.

selections.name: Golden Guru
selections.reason: Strong third first-up and has an excellent second-up record. The one to beat.

selections.name: Veloce Girl
selections.reason: Solid third on debut and has upside. Should be right in the finish with natural improvement.

selections.name: Friend In Me
selections.reason: Resuming but showed good ability last prep with a close second. Trialled okay.

selections.name: Wine Snob
selections.reason: Resuming. Showed promise last campaign and draws perfectly to get a soft run.

danger_horse.name: Andrefi
danger_horse.reason: Resuming after a solid fourth on debut. Can run a big race fresh.

selections.name: Let It Ride (NZ)
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start and is peaking third-up. Draws well and should be very hard to hold out.

selections.name: Bouzy's Babe
selections.reason: Consistent form and ran a solid third last start. Wide draw is tricky but has the class.

selections.name: Fierce Kiwi
selections.reason: Good third last start and should appreciate the mile. Another with a wide draw to overcome.

selections.name: Discreetly Blue
selections.reason: Racing well recently and wasn't far away last start. Genuine top-three prospect.

danger_horse.name: Goodwin Guru
danger_horse.reason: Ran a nice third last start at big odds. Can feature if she repeats that effort.

selections.name: Aramoso
selections.reason: Broke through for a deserved win last start. Well placed in this company to go back-to-back.

selections.name: Petit Eagle
selections.reason: Strong win last start and has found form. Wide draw is a slight negative but is a major threat.

selections.name: It's Only Magic
selections.reason: Consistent type who ran a solid third last start. Should be in the finish again.

selections.name: Common Interest
selections.reason: Racing well in stronger grade. Drops in class here and draws perfectly.

danger_horse.name: Canny Defense
danger_horse.reason: Not far away last start and maps to get a good run from the inside draw.

selections.name: Takeover Lad
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start and draws perfectly. Looks the one to beat in this heat.

selections.name: Prince Kuro
selections.reason: Won well last start and can go on with it here despite the class rise.

selections.name: Over The Edge
selections.reason: Solid third last start and is racing in good form. Wide draw is the main concern.

selections.name: Royal Trapeze
selections.reason: Consistent recent form and wasn't far away last start. Can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Political Promise
danger_horse.reason: Ran a nice third fresh and will strip fitter. Good draw helps.

selections.name: Reine Of Nine
selections.reason: Excellent second last start and is well placed here. Should be very hard to beat.

selections.name: Aztec Dancer
selections.reason: Consistent form with a solid third last start. Wide draw is a major hurdle over this short trip.

selections.name: Princess Now
selections.reason: Broke through for a win last start. Up in class but has confidence.

selections.name: She's Xtravagant
selections.reason: Not far away last start and has the ability to feature in this grade.

danger_horse.name: Mine All Mine
danger_horse.reason: Ran fairly last start but is capable of better on his day.

selections.name: Robert The Puss
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start and is racing in peak form. The one they have to beat.

selections.name: France's Boy
selections.reason: Veteran who showed he still has it with a strong second last start. Draws well.

selections.name: Explicable
selections.reason: Consistent type who ran a solid third last start. Should be right in the mix.

selections.name: Head Of The Herd
selections.reason: Not far away last start and maps perfectly from the inside draw.

danger_horse.name: Geetee Forty
danger_horse.reason: Ran fairly last start and can improve third-up. Worth including in exotics.

selections.name: Our Sassy Lady (NZ)
selections.reason: Strong winner last start and draws perfectly to get a soft run. Can go back-to-back.

selections.name: Fiora Blue
selections.reason: Won well last start. Wide draw is a slight concern but has the form on the board.

selections.name: Territorian
selections.reason: Narrowly beaten last start and is racing very well. Major player despite the draw.

selections.name: Aitch D'amico
selections.reason: Consistent form and wasn't far away last start. Can figure in the finish.

danger_horse.name: Retourne (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Solid third last start and is well placed to run a big race here.
